HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK HEARING SET FOR JUL-12-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. $1,400.02 SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT TOWARDS THE JUDGMENT. THE REMAINDER OF THE AMOUNT HELD SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR BECAUSE SHE HAS SHOWN IT IS EXEMPT UNDER CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 704.160. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is Granted in part. $1,400.02 shall be released to the judgment creditor for payment towards the judgment. The remainder of the amount held shall be released to the judgment debtor because she has shown it is exempt under California Code of Civil Procedure section 704.160. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =(302/HEK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Continued To Jul-12-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
